headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Weyerhaeuser, Lowers Price Target to $27
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Roxland   maintains Weyerhaeuser (NYSE:WY) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $28 to $27.
